meta.name: TaxEase Design System — Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
meta.description: Visual design language for a Nigerian fintech/compliance SaaS landing page, fully mapped to Tailwind CSS utility classes and shadcn/ui component primitives.
meta.replication_intent: Drop this file into Cursor as context. Every token maps directly to a Tailwind class or a shadcn component. No guessing required.

tailwind_config.notes: Extend the default Tailwind config with these custom tokens in tailwind.config.ts. This makes all custom colors available as standard Tailwind classes (e.g. bg-primary, text-accent).

globals_css.notes: shadcn/ui uses CSS variables in :root for its theming. Map the brand palette here so shadcn components inherit the right colors automatically.
globals_css.note: Run `npx shadcn@latest init` then replace the generated :root values with these to apply the brand palette globally to all shadcn components.

colors.notes: Every color token maps to both its hex value AND the corresponding Tailwind class. Always use the Tailwind class in code.

typography.notes: Font loaded via next/font or Google Fonts link. All type styles map to Tailwind text utilities.

font_setup.next_font_snippet:
import { Plus_Jakarta_Sans } from 'next/font/google';
export const jakarta = Plus_Jakarta_Sans({ subsets: ['latin'], weight: ['400','500','600','700','800'], variable: '--font-sans' });

hero_headline.tailwind: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold leading-[1.1] tracking-tight text-gray-900
hero_headline.note: Use responsive text scale. Split into two lines — second line uses italic + text-accent

hero_headline_italic_accent.note: Apply to a wrapping the second headline line. e.g. without stress.

section_eyebrow.note:
Render as a

or above the section headline

section_headline.tailwind: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-[40px] font-bold leading-[1.15] tracking-tight text-gray-900

nav_link.tailwind: text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors duration-150

link_cta.tailwind: text-[13px] font-semibold text-primary hover:text-primary-mid no-underline inline-flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors duration-150
link_cta.note: Used for 'Learn more →' inline card links

spacing.notes: All spacing uses Tailwind's default scale (base 4px). Section padding uses responsive py utilities.
spacing.section_wrapper: py-16 md:py-20 lg:py-24 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-12

border_radius.notes: Using Tailwind built-ins plus custom 'card', 'badge', 'icon', 'cta' values from tailwind.config.ts

shadows.notes: Custom shadow tokens registered in tailwind.config.ts under theme.extend.boxShadow

setup.add_components: npx shadcn@latest add button badge card avatar separator navigation-menu

primary.usage: Main CTA — 'Start Filing Free', 'Get Started Now'
primary.jsx: <Button className='bg-primary hover:bg-primary-dark text-white font-semibold rounded-[10px] px-6 py-3 shadow-btn-primary hover:shadow-btn-primary-hover hover:-translate-y-px transition-all duration-200'>Start Filing Free →</Button>
primary.tailwind_overrides: bg-primary hover:bg-primary-dark shadow-btn-primary hover:shadow-btn-primary-hover hover:-translate-y-px transition-all duration-200

outline_white.usage: Inside dark featured card — 'Talk to Sales'
outline_white.jsx: <Button variant='outline' className='border-white/50 text-white bg-transparent hover:bg-white/10 rounded-[10px]'>Talk to Sales</Button>

cta_banner.usage: Final CTA on dark banner — 'Get Started Now'
cta_banner.jsx: <Button className='bg-white text-primary-dark hover:bg-gray-100 font-semibold rounded-[10px] px-8 py-3'>Get Started Now →</Button>

compliance_pill.usage: Hero eyebrow badge — 'NIGERIA TAX ACT 2025 READY'
compliance_pill.jsx: <Badge className='bg-brand-badge-bg text-brand-badge-text border border-accent/20 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold tracking-[0.04em] uppercase'>NIGERIA TAX ACT 2025 READY</Badge>

secure_badge.jsx: <Badge className='bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-0 text-xs font-medium'>✓ Verified 100% Secure</Badge>

feature_card.jsx: <Card className='bg-white border border-gray-200/60 rounded-card shadow-card hover:shadow-card-hover hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 cursor-default'><CardContent className='p-6'>{children}</CardContent></Card>
feature_card.tailwind_overrides: rounded-card shadow-card hover:shadow-card-hover hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200

featured_dark_card.usage: Enterprise CTA card breaking the grid in features section
featured_dark_card.jsx: <Card className='bg-primary-dark border-0 rounded-card text-white'><CardContent className='p-8 flex flex-col gap-4'>{children}</CardContent></Card>

testimonial_card.usage: Social proof section — each review tile
testimonial_card.jsx: <Card className='bg-white border border-gray-200/60 rounded-card shadow-card hover:shadow-card-hover hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200'><CardContent className='p-6 flex flex-col gap-4'>{children}</CardContent></Card>

hero_widget.usage: Floating product preview card in the hero right column
hero_widget.jsx: <Card className='bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 p-5'>{children}</Card>

stat_card.usage: Individual stat item in the social proof bar
stat_card.jsx: {children}
stat_card.note: This is a plain div, not a shadcn Card — the stat bar is a flex row of borderless items

Avatar.jsx: <Avatar className='h-9 w-9'><AvatarImage src={src} /><AvatarFallback className='bg-primary-light text-white text-xs font-semibold'>{initials}</AvatarFallback></Avatar>

Separator.usage: Dividers between footer columns, or between stat items on mobile

NavigationMenu.import: import { NavigationMenu, NavigationMenuList, NavigationMenuItem, NavigationMenuLink } from '@/components/ui/navigation-menu'

layout_classes.notes: Exact Tailwind class strings for every major layout pattern in the page.

navbar.outer: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-brand-bg/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-200 h-16
navbar.inner: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 h-full flex items-center justify-between
navbar.logo_icon: w-8 h-8 bg-primary rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center
navbar.nav_link: text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors duration-150

hero.inner: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[55fr_45fr] gap-12 items-center
hero.headline: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-extrabold leading-[1.1] tracking-tight text-gray-900

stats_bar.inner: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 divide-x divide-gray-200
stats_bar.stat_item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 py-2 px-4
stats_bar.stat_label: text-[11px] font-medium tracking-[0.06em] uppercase text-gray-400 text-center

features.header: flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-2 mb-12
features.icon_container: w-10 h-10 rounded-icon flex items-center justify-center mb-4
features.card_link: text-[13px] font-semibold text-primary hover:text-primary-mid inline-flex items-center gap-1 mt-3 transition-colors

process.header: flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-2 mb-12
process.step_number: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-extrabold text-accent opacity-25 leading-none

cta_banner.card: bg-primary-dark rounded-cta px-8 py-16 md:py-20 flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-5
cta_banner.headline: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold text-white leading-[1.15] tracking-tight max-w-xl
cta_banner.trust_row: flex items-center gap-5 mt-1 text-xs text-white/50 font-medium

footer.grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-[2fr_1fr_1fr_1fr] gap-10 mb-10
footer.link_col_title: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-gray-900 mb-3
footer.link_col_link: text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors block mb-2
footer.bottom_bar: border-t border-gray-200 pt-6 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-400

icon_system.import: import { Calculator, FileText, Bell, FilePdf, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'

container_pattern.tailwind: w-10 h-10 rounded-icon flex items-center justify-center

animation.philosophy: Scroll-triggered entrances. Nothing decorative without purpose. Cards stagger in. Hero elements cascade on load.

scroll_trigger_config.note: Use whileInView on motion.div wrappers with the viewport config above. All animations fire once.

ScrollReveal.description: Drop-in scroll reveal wrapper. Wrap any JSX block to animate it into view.

StaggerGrid.description: Wraps a card grid and staggers child entrances on scroll.

component_recipes.notes: Full JSX patterns for each major page component, using shadcn primitives + Tailwind classes + framer-motion.

FeatureCard.description: Feature grid tile with icon, title, description, and learn more link
FeatureCard.jsx:

contrast_breaks.description: Deliberate bg alternation guides eye through the page. Defined in Tailwind.

section_anatomy: 1. <span> eyebrow — text-[11px] font-semibold tracking-[0.12em] uppercase text-accent
2. <h2> section headline — text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900
5. Optional CTA link or button at bottom

trust_signals.hero: Badge pill (compliance) + hero widget (verified badge + naira amount)
trust_signals.stats_bar: 4 proof numbers with icons — 10k+ users, ₦0K transfers, 98% accuracy, 4.8/5 rating
trust_signals.testimonials: Real names, city attribution, star ratings
trust_signals.cta_banner: 'No credit card · Cancel anytime' below the button

copywriting_patterns.hero_headline: Bold claim line + italic accent line below. e.g. 'File taxes' + italic 'without stress.'
copywriting_patterns.eyebrow: SCREAMING SNAKE CASE, max 4 words. e.g. 'CAPABILITIES', 'SOCIAL PROOF', 'PROCESS'
copywriting_patterns.stat: Number + short uppercase label. Currency uses ₦ symbol for Nigerian context.
copywriting_patterns.feature_title: 2-3 word noun phrase. e.g. 'Smart Tax Calculator'
copywriting_patterns.process_step: Imperative verb phrase. e.g. 'Add your numbers'
copywriting_patterns.testimonial: Problem → relief arc. First person. Specific detail + location attribution.
copywriting_patterns.cta_banner: Aspirational framing. 'Join the future of [category].' Never feature-led.

ai_replication_guide.cursor_instruction: Reference this file as context. Follow the tailwind_config section first to set up tokens. Then use layout_classes for structure, shadcn_components for UI primitives, and animation.reusable_components for scroll effects.
setup_order: 2. Run: npx shadcn@latest init — accept defaults, set primary color to #1E4D35
4. Extend tailwind.config.ts with all values from tailwind_config.config
6. Create ScrollReveal and StaggerGrid components from animation.reusable_components
7. Build sections top-to-bottom following page_structure order
8. Apply layout_classes to each section wrapper
9. Use shadcn_components for all interactive UI (Button, Card, Badge, Avatar)
10. Apply section_animation_map variants using whileInView with scroll_trigger_config viewport
what_makes_it_distinct: Hero headline italic accent line — without stress.
Naira widget in hero right column — product tangibility in local currency
bg-primary-dark Card breaking the features grid for enterprise upsell
Step numbers: text-5xl font-extrabold text-accent opacity-25
Consistent 'Learn more →' ArrowRight icon links on all feature cards
Trust micro-copy below CTA button: text-xs text-white/50
